description: Daily Tracker - App pessoal para acompanhamento diário de dieta, suplementos, medicamentos manipulados, hidratação, cardio e treino. Dark mode, amber accent, React Native + Expo. Plano real: Gabriel Cruz, Fev/2026, Team GB.

userStories.title: Initialize Expo project with NativeWind and Expo Router tabs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the project scaffolded with Expo, Expo Router file-based routing, NativeWind (Tailwind CSS), and the 3-tab layout (Hoje/Treino/Histórico) with dark theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Expo project initialized with TypeScript template
Expo Router configured with (tabs) layout containing index.tsx, treino.tsx, historico.tsx
config.tsx exists as a modal route
NativeWind installed and configured with tailwind.config.js
Tab bar styled: dark background #0c0a09, amber #f59e0b active tint, stone #78716c inactive tint
Root layout sets dark background and StatusBar to light
All three tabs render placeholder content
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define theme constants and shared UI components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a centralized theme file with all color tokens and reusable UI components (Card, Badge, ProgressBar).
acceptanceCriteria: constants/theme.ts exports theme object with: bg (#0c0a09, #1c1917, #292524), accent (#f59e0b, #92400e), semantic (#22c55e, #f59e0b, #ef4444), text (#fafaf9, #a8a29e, #78716c), border (#292524)
components/ui/Card.tsx renders a styled card with #1c1917 background and #292524 border
components/ui/Badge.tsx renders a small colored badge with configurable text and color
components/checklist/ProgressBar.tsx renders an amber progress bar accepting completados/total props
All components use NativeWind classes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define hardcoded plan data with real protocol data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the TypeScript types and real hardcoded plan data from the Feb/2026 Team GB plan.
acceptanceCriteria: data/plano.ts exports types: Categoria, RegraCondicional, ItemDoPlano (with opcional and subItens fields), Periodo, Dica, Plano
Jejum period with: Cafeína 220mg, Ioimbina 10mg, Teacrine 150mg, Anastrozol 0.5mg (diasDaSemana: [1,5])

Refeição 1 (desjejum/pré treino) with: 6 claras, 2 ovos inteiros, 30g aveia, 100g mamão, 10g chia, 20g pasta de amendoim, canela/adoçante. Sub-itens: Vit C 1g, Polivitamínico TEAM GB, NAC 600mg, Omega 3 2000mg, Vit E 400ui, Berberina 500mg, Nattokinase 150mg, Dobesilato de Cálcio 500mg

Refeição 2 (pré treino) with: 180g frango/tilápia, 90g arroz/macarrão, 8g azeite, 100g vegetais, folhas. Sub-itens: Cafeína 220mg, Ioimbina 10mg, Teacrine 150mg, Vit C 1g, Oxandrolona 40mg (apenasEmDiaDeTreino: true)
Intra Treino (apenasEmDiaDeTreino: true) with: Intensity Hunter 40g, Glutamina 10g, Creatina 10g, EAAs 10g
Refeição 3 (pós treino) with: Killer Whey 40g, 100g morango. Sub-itens: Glifage XR 500mg, NAC 600mg, Picolinato de Cromo 350mcg, Cafeína 210mg
Refeição 4 with: 180g frango/tilápia, 90g batata, 100g abacaxi/kiwi, 8g azeite, 100g vegetais, folhas. No supplements.

Refeição 5 (ceia) with: 180g carne vermelha magra, 2 ovos, 90g batata, 100g mamão, 100g vegetais, folhas. Sub-itens: Vit C 1g, Glifage XR 500mg, Omega 3 2000mg, Vit E 400ui, NAC 600mg, Nattokinase 150mg
Protocolo Hormonal period with: Enantest 150mg, Masteron 100mg, Trembolona 75mg (all diasDaSemana: [1,3,5])
Abdômen and Panturrilha items with opcional: true, apenasEmDiaDeTreino: true
metaHidratacao: { aguaMl: 4000, chaMl: 500 }, metaCardioMin: 80
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define hardcoded workout data with real exercises
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the real workout data for the 5-day training split from the Feb/2026 plan.
acceptanceCriteria: data/treinos.ts exports types: Serie, Exercicio, Treino

Treino A (Peito): Supino inclinado máquina/hammer 2xWS+2xTS, Supino inclinado smith 2xWS+1xTS, Crucifixo inclinado halteres 2xWS+1xTS+1xBS(15), Supino reto máquina 2xWS+1xTS+1xCS(4+4+4), Crucifixo/peck deck 2xWS+1xTS, Supino declinado halteres 1xWS+1xTS+1xBS(15), Cross over 2xWS+1xTS

Treino B (Costas): Remada curvada pronada 2xWS+2xTS, Remada cavalinho supinada 2xWS+1xTS+1xBS(15), Remada baixa neutra/triângulo 2xWS+1xTS, Puxada frente aberta pronada 2xWS+1xTS, Puxada frente fechada/supinada 3xWS, Pulldown corda 2xWS+1xTS, Hiperextensão lombar com carga 3xWS

Treino C (Pernas): Agachamento smith 2xWS+2xTS, Leg press 45° 2xWS+2xTS, Stiff barra livre 2xWS+1xTS+1xTS, Mesa flexora 2xWS+1xTS+1xCS(5+5+5/10seg), Cadeira extensora 1seg pico 2xWS+2xTS, Cadeira abdutora 2xWS+1xTS, Elevação pélvica 2xWS+1xTS, Cadeira adutora 2xWS+1xTS

Treino D (Ombros): Desenvolvimento máquina 2xWS+2xTS, Elevação frontal halteres banco 45° 2xWS+1xTS, Elevação lateral halteres 2xWS+2xTS+1xBS(15), Elevação lateral máquina 1seg pico 2xWS+1xTS+1xCS(5+5+5), Elevação lateral unilateral sentado 2xWS+1xTS, Crucifixo inverso halteres 2xWS+1xTS, Encolhimento smith 3xWS

Treino E (Braços): Rosca martelo halteres 2xWS+1xTS, Tríceps francês halter 2xWS+1xTS, Rosca direta polia barra W 2xWS+1xTS, Tríceps polia barra W 2xWS+1xTS, Rosca Scott máquina 2xWS+1xTS, Tríceps testa polia/corda 2xWS+1xTS, Rosca banco 45° halteres 2xWS+1xTS, Tríceps polia corda 2xWS+1xTS, Rosca inversa 3xWS
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define hardcoded tips data (nutrition and training)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the real tips/guidelines from the personal trainer hardcoded for display in the app.
acceptanceCriteria: data/dicas.ts exports type Dica: { id: string, categoria: 'nutricao' | 'treino', texto: string }

12 nutrition tips covering: food weighing (cooked), preparation (no industrial seasoning), allowed seasonings, zero-calorie sauces, zero-sugar drinks (don't count as hydration), sodium guidelines, 100% protocol adherence, meal reordering on schedule changes, no snacking between meals, free meal rules, food substitution via report

13 training tips covering: mobility/warmup, warm-up sets, feeder sets, WS/TS/CS/BS definitions and rep ranges, rest intervals (45s/60-120s/120-240s), mind-muscle connection, range of motion, cadence, abs/calves 3x/week, cardio 80min/day split in 2 sessions
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create day utility functions for training day logic and item filtering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need utility functions to determine if today is a training day, filter plan items by day rules, and calculate the current training letter (A-E).
acceptanceCriteria: utils/diaUtils.ts exports isDiaDeTreino(dayOfWeek: number, diaOffManual: boolean): boolean
utils/diaUtils.ts exports filtrarItensDoDia(periodos: Periodo[], dayOfWeek: number, diaOffManual: boolean): Periodo[] that filters items based on regra conditions
utils/diaUtils.ts exports getTreinoDoDia(dayOfWeek: number): Treino | null returning correct A-E rotation for seg-sex, null for weekends
utils/diaUtils.ts exports contarItens(periodos: Periodo[]): { total: number, totalComOpcionais: number } excluding optional items from total
Monday=1 returns A, Tuesday=2 returns B, etc. Saturday/Sunday returns null
Filtered periods exclude items whose regra doesn't match current day
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Zustand day store with AsyncStorage persist middleware
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the main day store with checks, hydration, cardio, and free meal state, persisted via Zustand middleware.
acceptanceCriteria: stores/useDayStore.ts exports useDayStore with DayState shape matching PRD section 5.2
State includes: checks (Record<string, {checked, timestamp}>), diaOffManual, aguaMl, chaMl, sessoesCardio, refeicaoLivreUsada, refeicaoLivrePeriodoId, semanaRefeicaoLivre, ultimoReset
Actions: toggleCheck(id), setDiaOff(value), addAgua(ml), removeAgua(ml), addCha(ml), removeCha(ml), addSessaoCardio(min), removeSessaoCardio(index), usarRefeicaoLivre(periodoId), resetDay()
Uses Zustand persist middleware with createJSONStorage(() => AsyncStorage)
Store name is 'day-store'
removeAgua/removeCha clamp to minimum 0
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Zustand history store with persist middleware
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the history store to persist daily adherence records.
acceptanceCriteria: stores/useHistoryStore.ts exports useHistoryStore with HistoryState: { dias: Record<string, HistoricoDia> }
HistoricoDia type: { data: string, completados: number, total: number, itensPerdidos: string[] }
Actions: salvarDia(historico: HistoricoDia), getDia(data: string): HistoricoDia | undefined
Uses Zustand persist middleware with store name 'history-store'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Zustand config store for notification settings
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the config store for notification toggles and schedule settings.
acceptanceCriteria: stores/useConfigStore.ts exports useConfigStore
State: notificacoesPorPeriodo (Record<string, { enabled: boolean, horario: string }>), hidratacaoLembrete: { enabled: boolean, intervaloHoras: number }
Actions: toggleNotificacaoPeriodo(periodoId), setHorarioPeriodo(periodoId, horario), toggleHidratacaoLembrete(), setIntervaloHidratacao(horas)
Uses Zustand persist middleware with store name 'config-store'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement reset logic (4am daily reset with history save)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the reset utility that checks on app open if the day changed (using 4am cutoff) and saves history before resetting.
acceptanceCriteria: utils/resetUtils.ts exports checkAndReset() function
Compares ultimoReset with current date using 4am as day boundary (before 4am counts as previous day)
When day changed: calculates itensPerdidos from unchecked non-optional items, calls useHistoryStore.salvarDia(), then calls useDayStore.resetDay()
When day changed and it's Monday with new week: also resets refeicaoLivreUsada and refeicaoLivrePeriodoId
When app was closed for multiple days: only saves history for ultimoReset date, intermediate days get no entry
Updates ultimoReset to current date after reset
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build CheckItem component with haptic feedback
userStories.description: As a user, I want to tap items to check/uncheck them with satisfying haptic feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: components/checklist/CheckItem.tsx renders item name, dosagem, and a checkmark
Checked state: green #22c55e checkmark, text with reduced opacity
Unchecked state: empty circle border, full opacity text
Optional items render with muted text #78716c and a subtle 'opcional' badge
Tapping triggers expo-haptics ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light and calls toggleCheck
Sub-items render indented below parent item
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build PeriodoSection collapsible component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my daily items grouped by meal/period in collapsible sections.
acceptanceCriteria: components/checklist/PeriodoSection.tsx renders a collapsible section with period name as header
Header shows period name, item count badge (e.g. '3/5'), and chevron icon
Section expands/collapses on header tap with animation
Renders CheckItem for each item in the period (including sub-items)
When refeição livre is active for this period: shows 'Refeição Livre' text instead of items, all checks auto-marked
Sections default to expanded state

Decrement button: -250ml per type (does not go below 0)

userStories.title: Implement local notification scheduling
userStories.description: As a user, I want to receive notifications reminding me of pending meals and hydration.
acceptanceCriteria: utils/notificationUtils.ts exports scheduleNotificacoes() and cancelAllNotificacoes()
Requests notification permission on first call
Schedules daily repeating notifications per period based on useConfigStore settings
Schedules hydration reminders every N hours between 7h-22h based on config
Cancels and reschedules when config changes
Cancels hydration notifications dynamically when water goal is met
Notification tap opens app via Expo Router deep link
